channel.title: Daily Briefing
channel.description: Your AI-powered daily news podcast covering technology, AI, world affairs, and business & finance.
channel.itunes:author: Daily Briefing Podcast

item.title: Daily Briefing — Tuesday, April 7, 2026
item.description:
Daily Briefing — Tuesday, April 7, 2026
**INTRO** Hello and welcome to Daily Briefing! It’s Tuesday, April 7, 2026. I’m Marcus. And I’m Sofia. Thanks for joining us today. We have a lot to cover, starting with technology, where we're getting a sneak peek at a foldable iPhone and some intriguing moves in the AI sector. Absolutely fascinating, Marcus. And speaking of AI, we’ve got developments that might change how small businesses operate and potentially, the future of jobs as we know them. On the world stage, tensions are mounting with a looming deadline related to Iran that President Trump has set — it's shaping up to be a pivotal moment. And in the business world, big money moves with Universal Music and potential price hikes rippling from the conflict in the Middle East. Stick around as we unpack these stories and more. Let's dive in! **TECHNOLOGY…

item.title: Daily Briefing — Monday, April 6, 2026
item.description:
Daily Briefing — Monday, April 6, 2026
**INTRO** Good morning, everyone. It's Monday, April 6th, 2026, and welcome to the Daily Briefing. I'm Marcus, here with the key stories you need to know today. Our top story in technology is about potential AI influences on search engine results — a development that might change how we see the digital landscape. That's right, Marcus. And in the world of artificial intelligence, we're looking at how small online sellers are leveraging AI to guide their production decisions. It's an interesting intersection of tech and commerce. In world affairs, tensions are high as Iran and the United States trade threats over the Strait of Hormuz, which has significant implications for global energy supplies. Quite important, Marcus, and in the business and finance arena, we're focusing on Jamie Dimon's latest shareholder letter, where he discusses major risks in geopolitics and AI.
